zh.lifeSummary: 當Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery於大約1440年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery31歲，母親Lady Ellen McCarthy25歲。他和Lady Catherine FitzGerald至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1505年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery于大约1440年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery31岁，母亲Lady Ellen McCarthy25岁。他和Lady Catherine FitzGerald至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1505年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.

en.lifeSummary: When Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery was born about 1440, in Ireland, his father, Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery, was 31 and his mother, Lady Ellen McCarthy, was 25. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Catherine FitzGerald. He died in 1505, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery est né environ 1440, à Irlande, son père, Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen McCarthy, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Catherine FitzGerald. Il est décédé en 1505, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery um 1440 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery 31 und seine Mutter Lady Ellen McCarthy 25. Er hatte mit Lady Catherine FitzGerald mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Cork, County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery è nato il circa 1440 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ellen McCarthy, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Catherine FitzGerald. Morì nel 1505, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carberyが約1440年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carberyは31歳，母Lady Ellen McCarthyは25歳であった。彼はLady Catherine FitzGeraldとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1505年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery(이)가 대략 1440년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen McCarthy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Lady Catherine FitzGerald(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Irlanda, seu pai, Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen McCarthy, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Catherine FitzGerald. Ele faleceu em 1505, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery родился около 1440 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen McCarthy, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Catherine FitzGerald. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery nació aproximadamente 1440, en Irlanda, su papá, Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen McCarthy, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Catherine FitzGerald. Murió en 1505, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 66 años.
